RegLoan Bank — Underwriting Policy & Rate Sheet Document POL-0002 Page 1 of 2 APR Rate Matrix by FICO x LTV Loan-to-Value tier APR FICO Band LTV <=80% LTV 81-90% LTV 91-100% LTV 101-110% LTV 111-120% 580-619 13.09% 4.25% 8.33% 7.9% 7.61% 620-659 12.31% 4.69% 4.66% 11.68% 13.24% 660-699 6.66% 5.43% 7.89% 8.28% 9.52% OK — UW
